name: harness-claude-binary
description: Claude binary harness — spawns the `claude` CLI as a subprocess (legacy --print path). Registers `claude-binary` into the harnesses register; the binary path resolution + sysprompt assembly logic stays in bridge/providers/claude-{run,stream}.ts because those files use private helpers shared with provider/core.ts. Disabling this module removes the binary harness from /v1/stream/'s dispatch lookup; the dispatcher then falls back to whatever else is in the register (claude-sdk is core-pinned so it always remains).
